prompt: Switch the active directory to the Desktop.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the File Explorer window, navigate from the currently selected 'Documents' directory to the 'Desktop' directory. Highlight 'Desktop' in the left-hand navigation pane, update the address bar at the top of the window to display 'Desktop', and replace the main content area with the typical files and folders found on a user's desktop.
objects: 'Desktop' highlighted in the left-hand navigation pane
Typical desktop files and folders in the main content area
Introduction to Fourier Optics 2ed Goodman J. (should not be present)
